# Timeline

The proposed work amounts to roughly **100 hours** of expert developer time, structured as a focused **3-month period**.

## Gantt Chart

```{mermaid}
gantt
    title HydraR 3-Month Development Timeline
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    axisFormat  %m/%y
    
    section Infrastructure
    Restart checkpt & DuckDB memory       :active, dev1, 2026-05-01, 25d
    Dynamic Network Repair & Validation   :dev2, after dev1, 20d
    Keys Security (SSH agent)             :dev3, after dev2, 10d
    
    section Sandboxing
    Docker Integration                    :dev4, 2026-05-15, 20d
    Git worktree in Docker                :dev5, after dev4, 15d
    Singularity & Apptainer               :dev6, after dev5, 20d
    
    section Interoperability
    Ellmer, Mall, Targets & Reticulate    :dev7, 2026-06-01, 15d
    Nextflow Interoperability             :dev8, after dev7, 20d
    BioConductor / CRAN support           :dev9, after dev8, 20d
    
    section Management
    Agents & Skills Management            :dev10, 2026-07-01, 15d
    Documentation, Hardening & Release    :dev11, after dev10, 15d
```

## Phase 1: Infrastructure & Sandboxing (Month 1)
- Finalization of native restart checkpointing, DuckDB persistence, and object hashing logic.
- Implementation of API Key Security bounds using SSH agents.
- Core Docker integration with preliminary git worktree structuring.

## Phase 2: Interoperability & Network Repair (Month 2)
- Formal deployment of Dynamic Network Repair and preparedness features (growth, pruning).
- Interoperability tests binding HydraR to Nextflow, `targets`, `ellmer`, and `mall`.
- Emulation and build compatibility mapping for Singularity and Apptainer environments.

## Phase 3: Community, Bioconductor & Agents Lifecycle (Month 3)
- Reticulate interface mappings, alongside deep BioConductor and CRAN system-call handlers.
- Finalization of Agents and Skills Management tools into lifecycle modules.
- Refactoring, bug fixing, documentation generation, and release processing.

<!-- APAF Bioinformatics | proposal/04-timeline.qmd | Approved | 2026-04-17 -->
